utterances.speaker: Rachel
utterances.text: Hey Joey , is this the bed where Olivia lost her virginity ?

utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: I do not know , but one of the extras sure did ! Hey , listen Rach . Thanks again for coming down to watch my scenes !

emotion_cause.span: 2_Thanks again for coming down to watch my scenes !

utterances.speaker: Rachel
utterances.text: Oh , please ! Honey , just the fact that you want me here to support you , I am ... OH MY GOD ! Is that Christian Sanders ? He is so gorgeous !

emotion_cause.span: 3_Is that Christian Sanders ? He is so gorgeous !

utterances.speaker: Rachel
utterances.text: Oh , in my head he is done some pretty " not ... gay ... stuff " !

utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: Well , at the Christmas party him and Santa did some definitely gay stuff !
